# Thiago Novato - Software Engineer & Tech Writer
> Personal blog and portfolio of Thiago Novato, a software engineer
> with 20+ years of experience building software at scale.
> Content covers software engineering, career growth, React, Python,
> Node.js, data engineering, machine learning, and tech industry insights.
> Written in Portuguese (pt-BR) with some content in English.

## Author
- Name: Thiago Novato
- Role: Software Engineer
- Experience: 20+ years (since 2005)
- Location: Florida, USA
- Background: Started with PHP/MySQL, worked in industrial automation (PLCs), evolved to full-stack web, now data engineering
- Specialties: React, Node.js, Python, BigQuery, Airflow, NestJS, Kafka
- Currently: Enolytics (wine + data/AI)
- Notable: Built systems that processed 1M+ test results at Dasa

## Pages
- [Home](https://thiagonovato.dev/)
- [Blog](https://thiagonovato.dev/blog)
- [About](https://thiagonovato.dev/about)
- [Contact](https://thiagonovato.dev/contact)

## Blog Topics
- Software engineering best practices
- Career advice for developers (junior to senior)
- React, Node.js, Python tutorials and insights
- Data engineering with BigQuery, Airflow, Kafka
- Machine Learning applied to real industries
- Personal growth and professional development in tech
- International career (Brazilian developer in the US)
